sentences.english: I used to work seventy hours a week until my health suffered.
Now I strictly leave the office at six.
I work from home, so the line between work and life is really blurry.
sentences.korean: 재택근무라서 일과 삶의 경계가 정말 모호해요.

sentences.english: I email clients at midnight sometimes.
I think the key is having hobbies outside of work, so you don't think about work all the time.
sentences.korean: 핵심은 일 밖에서 취미를 갖는 거라고 생각해요. 항상 일 생각을 안 하도록요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
